response: Neighborhood enrichment analysis requires cell type annotations in slice 0. The session state shows slice 0 has 3,611 observations (spot-level data) but NO celltype annotations. You need to first annotate cell types using one of these methods: 1) Perform cell type deconvolution on spot-level data (if reference data available), 2) Use a reference dataset to annotate, or 3) Cluster and manually annotate. Once cell types are annotated in slice 0, you can run neighborhood enrichment analysis.
query_text: Test whether cell types co-localize spatially in this tissue.
